title: Supportive Chatbot
scenario: Create a chatbot persona for a mental health support service. The target audience is individuals aged 18-65. Develop a character that would provide a listening ear, empathy, and support. Ensure the persona is 100 words or less.
constraints: Use a supportive and empathetic tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona have a supportive and empathetic tone?
Does the persona description adhere to the word limit and tone constraints?
Does the persona use a clear and concise language style?
